# ./ns to agentic-kit replacement table

Generated from HEAD `3d6b1bf981fd8f864b49f0e726a8bf6308179154`.

Policy: `./ns` replacement/deprecation is required before GUI implementation. This table favors large safe migration slices: active workflow instructions should point to tested `agentic-kit` commands; historical notes may remain if explicitly labeled legacy.

## Known replacements

| Legacy reference | Preferred command |
| --- | --- |
| `./ns command-reference-check` | `agentic-kit transfer command-reference-check` |
| `./ns command-reference-refresh` | `agentic-kit transfer command-reference-refresh` |
| `./ns docs-audit` | `agentic-kit docs-audit` |
| `./ns post-merge-check` | `agentic-kit transfer post-merge-check` |
| `./ns post-merge-complete` | `agentic-kit transfer post-merge-complete` |
| `./ns pr-complete` | `agentic-kit transfer pr-complete` |
| `./ns pr-create-complete` | `agentic-kit transfer pr-create-complete` |
| `./ns protected-diff-plan` | `agentic-kit transfer protected-diff-plan` |
| `./ns repo-status` | `agentic-kit transfer repo-status` |
| `./ns rules acknowledge` | `agentic-kit rules acknowledge` |
| `./ns sync-main` | `agentic-kit transfer sync-main` |
